import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(text)
  let n = parts.len()
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0
  while i < n
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(v)
        total = total + v
      when None
        total = total
      end
    when None
      total = total
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let avg = total / n
  println("avg=#{avg}")
end
